name: Fetch file data
description: Download, parse, and return records from a configured file spec entity. The entity_type must match a key in the connector's fileSpecs configuration.

entity_type.description: File spec entity name (key from fileSpecs, e.g., 'products', 'inventory')

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 1000)

full_sync.description: If true, ignore incremental state and fetch all records
